name: the-nineteenth-chamber-backend
description: Backend services for The Nineteenth Chamber

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:app"
scripts.install-all: npm run install:gateway && npm run install:auth && npm run install:app
